report.headline: Cardiac Hypertrophy Indicators Detected
report.summary: Voltage criteria and repolarisation changes consistent with left or right ventricular hypertrophy. The model highlighted the R-wave and S-wave peaks — the primary amplitude-based diagnostic features.
report.disclaimer: This output is generated by a research model trained on the PTB-XL dataset. It is not validated for clinical use and must not be used for diagnosis or treatment decisions.
